fields.name: House
fields.notes: Property link (rec…) or label — work orders try House then Property

fields.name: Name
fields.notes: Some bases use single Name vs First/Last

fields.name: Password
fields.notes: If manager portal uses password auth

fields.name: Photos
fields.notes: Listing photos; room shots may use axis-r{n}-* filenames

fields.name: Application Fee
fields.notes: Per-property override; tour/lease flows read this

fields.name: Other Info
fields.notes: JSON: axisListingMeta (leasing, financials, roomsDetail, tourSettings, …). See axisListingMeta.js

fields.name: Room Count
fields.notes: 1–20; drives which Room N * columns are used

fields.name: Room 1 Rent
fields.notes: Currency-style number; empty = no rent for slot

fields.name: Room 1 Utilities
fields.notes: Only Room 1 has this long-text utilities field in Airtable

fields.name: Room Name
fields.notes: Or use Room Number as primary label

fields.name: Description
fields.notes: May include portal_submitter_email: line when using placeholder resident

fields.name: Category
fields.type: Single line text or single select

fields.name: Status
fields.notes: createWorkOrder defaults Open; retried as Submitted if Open invalid

fields.name: Resident Profile
fields.notes: Default field name; fallbacks: Resident profile, Resident, Tenant, Resident Link, Resident ID

fields.name: Management Notes
fields.notes: Scheduled date meta lines e.g. scheduled date: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: (your column for real submitter email)
fields.notes: Required when using VITE_AIRTABLE_WORK_ORDER_RESIDENT_RECORD_ID placeholder resident link

fields.name: Subject
fields.notes: Set to none to skip writes

fields.name: Timestamp
fields.notes: Optional writable time; omit or none if using createdTime only

fields.name: Type
fields.type: Single line text or single select

fields.name: Application Fee Paid
fields.notes: Some manager UIs read fee columns by this label family

fields.name: Property
fields.notes: Often property name string; may be link in some bases

fields.name: Type
fields.notes: tour.js expects Type=tour for tour rows

fields.name: Property
fields.notes: Property name or id string depending on handler

fields.name: Notes
fields.notes: May embed Site Manager Email, Tour Manager, Tour Notes lines

fields.name: Day Of Week
fields.notes: 0–6 or 1–7 depending on scripts; align with tour booking code

fields.name: Consent for Credit and Background Check
Signature
fields.notes: Apply writes long text signature payload

applicationsBase.note: When unset, Applications may live in the same base as VITE_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID.

fields.name: Application ID
fields.notes: Display id; API uses Airtable record id rec…

fields.name: Signer Consent for Credit and Background Check
Additional Notes
fields.notes: Includes Axis meta blocks from buildAxisApplicationMetaNotes

fields.name: Rejected
fields.notes: Required on many bases so PATCH can clear rejection

fields.name: Approved Unit Room
fields.notes: Also try legacy column Approved Room

fields.name: Owner ID
fields.notes: Manager Airtable record id; tenant guard

fields.name: Application Fee Due (USD)
fields.notes: Optional column; when unset server skips writes

fields.name: (group apply checkbox)
fields.notes: Exact column name from your base when using optionalApplicationsTableSignerExtras
